Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme Residents Survey

  • Tweet

If you live in Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley or Upper Hulme, please do take a few minutes to fill in my The Year of the Moorlands Village Residents Survey.

Please email me on karen.bradley.mp for individual cases - I am here to help. 

2026 Residents Survey

  • Current Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme Survey
  • Your details
3. Which of these local issues are you concerned about?
4. Which is the most important local issue for you? Choose one.
5. Which of these national issues are important to you?
6. Which is the most important of the above national issues for you? Choose one.

Dame Karen Bradley MP Member of Parliament for Staffordshire Moorlands
